summary: Full e2e backend (17/17 pytest) + frontend Playwright pass. Login, RBAC, residents/notes/incidents CRUD, dashboard stats, voice transcription with real WAV, GPT-5.2 AI report generation all working. Frontend: login redirects to dashboard, sidebar nav, resident creation modal, voice mic on notes & incidents, reports page generate button all functional.

issues: Note shows resident name 'Unknown' when associated resident has been deleted (orphaned reference). Consider hiding orphaned notes or backfilling cascade behaviour.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event startup/shutdown - migrate to lifespan context manager.
CORS allow_origins reads '*' as default and splits by ',' which yields ['*'] - fine, but allow_credentials=False so cookies won't work if ever needed.
/api/voice/transcribe and /api/reports/generate raise 500 with raw exception text (`f'Transcription failed: {e}'`) - leaks internals; sanitize.
Date range query in /api/reports/generate compares ISO strings lexicographically; relies on consistent timezone-aware ISO. Works but brittle - prefer datetime objects.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook expects lockout after 5 fails).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Resident_A and TEST_UI_Resident plus TEST_note and TEST_incident; teardown removes TEST_ residents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints incl. voice (synthesizes 1s WAV) & GPT-5.2 report generation. JWT in localStorage as cc_token. All seeded users work. Voice & AI use EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
